name: Blueberry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the fruit in an 8-quart pot.
2. Add 1 box Sure-Jell to the crushed fruit.
3. Bring the mixture to a full boil.
4. Slowly add lemon juice and sugar, stirring constantly.
5. Return to a full rolling boil.
6. Skim off any foam that forms.
7. Quickly fill jars and seal them.
